headline: WorkJam Adds Autonomous AI Layer to Its Frontline Operations Platform
summary: WorkJam, the complete AI frontline operations platform used by leading retailers including TJX, Ulta Beauty, Marks & Spencer and Shell, today announced new autonomous AI capabilities that add a powerful intelligent layer on top of its existing unified platform.
